name: Thai Style Pumpkin Soup with Chillies and Lemongrass
recipeIngredient: 1 small pumpkin (such as buttercup), skinned and chopped into 1-inch chunks
1 tablespoon hot sweet Thai chilli sauce (or more)
OR 1/2 teaspoon lemon rind, finely grated
1 tablespoon fish sauce, may be doubled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat oil and gently cook onion with brown sugar and garlic over low heat until softened (8-10 minutes).
2. Add chopped pumpkin, water, coconut cream, chilli, lemon grass or rind, and fish sauce.
3. Season with freshly ground pepper. No salt should be needed as the fish sauce is very salty.
4. Simmer for about 25 minutes until tender.
5. Remove from heat and puree until smooth.
6. Just before serving, adjust seasoning to taste.
7. Mix in chopped coriander.
8. Ladle soup into heated bowls and garnish with a fresh coriander leaf.
